design_philosophy.emotional_tone: Empowering, Serious but Approachable, Secure, Cutting-Edge

typography.guidance: Use Playfair Display for all major headings to establish legal authority. Use Inter for all UI elements, forms, and long-form text for maximum readability.

usage_rules: Use Emerald (#047A6C) for primary actions (Buttons, Links) and brand identity.
Use Gold (#E5C67A) sparingly for 'Premium' or 'High Value' items (Lawyer Badges, Success Metrics).
Use Black (#0A0A0A) for high-contrast text and strong borders.
Use Silver (#C9D1D9) for subtle dividers and tech-inspired borders.
NEVER use gradients on text unless it's a very subtle Gold shimmer on dark backgrounds.

buttons.primary: bg-[#047A6C] text-white hover:bg-[#036459] rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-[#E5C67A] text-black hover:bg-[#D4B365] rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#047A6C] text-[#047A6C] hover:bg-[#047A6C] hover:text-white rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-gray-600 hover:text-[#047A6C] hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-md px-4 py-2

cards.style: bg-white dark:bg-zinc-900 border border-gray-200 dark:border-zinc-800 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.glass: bg-white/80 dark:bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 shadow-xl

inputs.style: bg-white dark:bg-zinc-900 border border-gray-300 dark:border-zinc-700 rounded-md px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#047A6C] focus:border-transparent transition-all placeholder:text-gray-400

badges.style: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

hero_lawyer.alt: Professional lawyer consulting a client in a modern office
hero_lawyer.usage: Hero section or 'For Lawyers' page header

tech_abstract.usage: Background overlay for AI Assistant or 'How it Works' section

legal_documents.usage: Legal Templates section or icon placeholder

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize MOBILE-FIRST responsiveness. Most users will access via phone.
Use 'Playfair Display' for Headings (h1, h2) and 'Inter' for Body text. Import these fonts via Google Fonts in index.html.
Ensure high contrast for accessibility (WCAG AA). Emerald text on white background must be readable.
Implement the 'Justice Wallet' section with a distinct Gold accent to signify value/finance.
The AI Assistant Chat should feel friendly but authoritative. Use a clean, card-based interface for messages.
Use 'lucide-react' for icons (Scale, Gavel, Shield, User, FileText, etc.).
Avoid full-screen gradients. Use subtle textures or the provided 'tech_abstract' image with low opacity.
Navigation: Sticky header with 'Get Help' (Emerald Button) and 'For Lawyers' (Gold Outline/Text) as key CTAs.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical grids where possible.
Ensure all images have proper alt text for accessibility.
Do not use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties (transform, opacity, colors).
